result.finding: The application depends on MySQL as its primary external database service. H2 in-memory database is used for development/testing (not an external service). Connection details are configured via environment variables MYSQL_HOST, MYSQL_PORT, MYSQL_DATABASE. Azure Database for MySQL is also supported via spring-cloud-azure-starter-jdbc-mysql dependency.
evidence: pom.xml: com.h2database:h2 (runtime scope, for dev/test only)
No docker-compose.yml defining external service containers
No Redis, RabbitMQ, Kafka, or Elasticsearch dependencies
values: Azure Database for MySQL (cloud-managed variant via Azure JDBC starter)
H2 (embedded in-memory, dev/test only — not external)
